title: Metaproject Security Phase 3: write-seam integrations (advisory-by-default gates)

AC1.note: src/security/guard.ts shared seam (guardOutput/redactRaw/securityFlowGate); disabled → no-op allow; formatGuardWarning emits category:count only (leak-safe, tested).

AC2.note: advisory → allowed:true always; enforced/ci → allowed:false on gate fail/needs-approval with masked reason. guard.test.ts covers all modes.

AC3.note: memory ingest calls guard target memory before write; enforced skips entry w/ reason, advisory writes + warns. security-seam test.

AC4.note: wiki collect guards draft write target wiki; advisory writes, enforced skips w/ securityReason. security-seam test.

AC5.note: test run gates raw-log persistence; gdctx redactRaw on raw output before persist (byte-identical unless secret detected). Verified secret not in ctx artifact.

AC6.note: advisory/disabled behavior-preserving: 118 pre-existing tests unchanged & green (git diff --stat HEAD -- *.test.ts empty); on-disk writes byte-identical; blocking only enforced/ci.

AC7.note: flow complete has a security GateOutcome mirroring health; omitted when disabled (existing 3-gate tests pass), advisory→pass, enforced/ci may fail. security-gate.test.ts.

AC8.note: 24 new integration tests (guard/memory/wiki/testing/flow) + testing-report leak regression; full suite 142 pass / 0 fail; tsc clean; pre-existing suite unchanged.

AC9.note: docs: security spec/README (Phase 3 implemented), roadmap, docs/docs modules/architecture/cli-reference seam notes; Phase 4 kept future; no drift.
